title: Bank CTBC Indonesia Deploys Infosys Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on Cloud
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys, announced the successful deployment of the Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on a cloud hosted model for PT Bank CTBC Indonesia. The deployment is part of the bank's digital transformation initiatives and includes the latest version of Finacle loans, deposits, trade finance, payments, and customer data hub. The release states the implementation is intended to improve scalability, shorten time-to-market for new products and services, improve operational efficiency, and enhance customer experience. The bank reported over 300% reduction in bulk processing time from using the Finacle suite on a PostgreSQL database platform. No deal value or contract duration was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Finacle and PT Bank CTBC Indonesia announced the successful deployment of Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on a cloud hosted model.
The deployment is part of Bank CTBC Indonesia's digital transformation initiatives.
Bank CTBC Indonesia upgraded to the latest version of Finacle loans, deposits, trade finance, payments, and customer data hub.
The Finacle solutions are integrated with Bank CTBC Indonesia's existing application landscape, including Finacle Online Banking and Finacle Retail Loan Origination solutions.
The release states that the Finacle suite on a PostgreSQL database platform resulted in over 300% reduction in bulk processing time.
The deployment is stated to support improved time-to-market for new offerings while maintaining robust security.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys Finacle deployed the Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on a cloud hosted model for Bank CTBC Indonesia as part of the bank's digital transformation initiatives.

products_or_platforms.name: Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite
products_or_platforms.description: The suite was deployed on a cloud hosted model for Bank CTBC Indonesia, including upgrades to Finacle loans, deposits, trade finance, payments, and customer data hub.

products_or_platforms.name: Finacle Customer Data Hub
products_or_platforms.description: The Finacle Customer Data Hub gives the bank a unified, 360-degree view of customer data, enabling hyper personalization of services and seamless third-party integration for allied offerings.
products_or_platforms.target_market_or_use_case: customer data management and personalized banking services

important_text_spans.text: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), and PT Bank CTBC Indonesia (Bank CTBC Indonesia), subsidiary of the CTBC Group, Taiwan, today announced the successful deployment of Finacle Digital Banking Solution Suite on a cloud hosted model
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the main commercial deployment and parties involved.

important_text_spans.text: The bank has upgraded to the latest version of Finacle loans, deposits, trade finance, payments, and customer data hub as part of this adoption.
important_text_spans.reason: Shows the scope of Infosys Finacle products included in the deployment.

important_text_spans.text: The combined solution has resulted in over 300% reduction in bulk processing time
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the stated operating performance benefit from the deployment.

important_text_spans.text: ensuring improved time-to-market for new offerings while maintaining robust security.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the stated business impact for the client.
